titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to mas'adah Ibn Sadaqah
Clarification of the Transmission Chain to mas'adah Ibn Sadaqah

segments: ه عن مسعدة بن صدقة فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن عبد اللّه بن جعفر الحميريّ، عن هارون بن مسلم، عن مسعدة بن صدقة الرّبعيّ‌.
arabic.text: ه عن مسعدة بن صدقة فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن عبد اللّه بن جعفر الحميريّ، عن هارون بن مسلم، عن مسعدة بن صدقة الرّبعيّ‌.

segments: Everything in this book that is narrated from Mas'adah ibn Sadaqah has been transmitted by me from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Abdullah ibn Ja'far Al-Himyari, from Harun ibn Muslim, from Mas'adah ibn Sadaqah Al-Ruba'i.
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: Everything in this book that is narrated from Mas'adah ibn Sadaqah has been transmitted by me from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Abdullah ibn Ja'far Al-Himyari, from Harun ibn Muslim, from Mas'adah ibn Sadaqah Al-Ruba'i.
